telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Apr 28, 2026 Markets reflected late-cycle anxiety as crypto liquidations ($342M) and Bitcoin's sub-$76K break signaled speculative froth unwinding, while traditional assets held steady amid rising recession/stagflation concerns. The divergence suggests institutional rotation from risk assets as central bank policy inflection points loom. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $76,442 · ETH: $2,296 · SOL: $83.79 · GOLD: $4,596 · SPY: $711.69 (-0.3%) · QQQ: $657.55 (-1.0%) · VIX: $17.83 (-1.1%) · TLT: $86.37 (-0.4%) · DXY: $98.63 (+0.2%) · OIL: $99.62 (+3.4%) EVENING NEWS ▼ Robinhood Shares Slide on 34% Decrease in Crypto Revenue ▲ Powell gets high marks on pandemic, weaker grade on inflation, Bullard says ▼ Hollywood Gear Supplier Quixote to Exit Atlanta Operations ▲ Bitcoin Flashes Bearish Signal. Is 10% Drop Imminent? ▲ Bitwise CIO says Strategy’s STRC could keep fueling Bitcoin’s latest rally ▲ Blockchain Association pushes to remove reputation risk from bank supervision SCENARIO SHIFTS ▲ Late Cycle: Crypto stress and inflation persistence suggest late-cycle dynamics strengthening ▲ Recession: Crypto liquidations and asset quality concerns point to potential downturn risks ▼ Goldilocks: Multiple stress signals and policy uncertainty reduce goldilocks probability ▲ Stagflation: Inflation persistence concerns and defense spending increases support stagflationary pressures ▲ Hegemony: European defense acceleration and geopolitical tensions reinforce hegemonic competition themes ▲ Displacement: Mining industry AI transition exemplifies ongoing technological displacement accelerating REGIME CHECK ▲ Risk-On · Neutral · OVERHEATING · Gauge: 23/100 UPCOMING — HIGH IMPACT US University of Michigan Consumer Confidence Index (Preliminary)(May) — May 8, 02:00 PM UTC (prev: 49.8) US Unemployment Rate(Apr) — May 8, 12:30 PM UTC (prev: 4.3%) US Seasonally adjusted changes in non-agricultural employment population (thousands)(Apr) — May 8, 12:30 PM UTC (prev: 178) EU Retail Sales (MoM)(Mar) — May 7, 09:00 AM UTC (prev: -0.2%) US Change in ADP employment (thousands)(Apr) — May 6, 12:15 PM UTC (prev: 62.0) EU Producer Price Index (YoY)(Mar) — May 6, 09:00 AM UTC (prev: -3.0%) CONTRARIAN • The $1.2B crypto ETP inflows during market stress suggest institutional accumulation may be setting • European defense spending acceleration could signal strength rather than desperation, positioning EU agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
